3251050.name: Tyro: Legend of Whisperwood
3251050.description:
Tyro: Legend of Whisperwood

A Souls-like Metroidvania where your choices shape reality, and your mind is as fragile as your body.

The Gladeblight spreads, twisting the creatures of Whisperwood into horrors beyond reason. As Tyro, a small but relentless field mouse, you seek revenge against the force that stole everything from you. But stopping the corruption won't be easy—every choice you make shapes the world around you, altering the story, enemies, and even your own perception of reality.

Survival is More Than Just Staying Alive

Tyro’s journey is a battle of both body and mind:
🩸 Health Bar – If depleted, Tyro enters a Fugue State, awakening at the last Safe Haven, his grip on reality slipping further.
🧠 Sanity Gauge – Losing sanity distorts reality, inducing hallucinations, time warps, and shifting environments. Paths, enemies, and abilities change based on Tyro’s mental state.

Every wound chips away at Tyro’s mind. Every choice alters his fate.
Will you remain in control, or let the madness take hold?

Key Features:

🔥 A Souls-Like Metroidvania – Brutal, skill-based combat meets deep exploration in a haunting, interconnected world.
🧠 Sanity System – As Tyro's mental state deteriorates, the world warps around him, revealing hidden paths, unlocking twisted abilities, and summoning horrors from beyond.
🔮 Choices Matter – Your actions permanently affect Tyro’s sanity, the world, and its inhabitants, leading to multiple endings and drastically different playthroughs.
🌲 A Haunting, Interconnected World – Explore the decaying beauty of Whisperwood, from moonlit ruins to gladeblight-infested tunnels, each hiding dark secrets and lost souls.

The Gladeblight spreads. The world crumbles. Will you break the cycle… or lose yourself to the madness?
3251050.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
